---
title: "Katharine Charlotte Brownlow"
---

## Katharine Charlotte Brownlow

**Dates:** (1868-1955)

**Maiden name:** (Harrison)

### Description

goddaughter of CMY, daughter of Thomas Elliot Harrison and Sophia Jane Collinson

### Biography

She married (1894) the Rev. Harold Arthur Brownlow.

### Letters

- Letter from June 1st [?1886]
- Letter from Novr 6th [1868]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
